The Process

Buy in 3
Simple Steps

Every transaction runs through buyer protection, from first browse to final fitment.

01

Browse the marketplace

Filter thousands of wheels from trusted sellers by size, bolt pattern, brand and finish.

02

Buy or make an offer

Pay the listed price instantly, or negotiate directly with the seller for the best deal.

03

Collect or get it delivered

Arrange local collection, or have your set couriered to your door in protective packaging.

Why Choose TORQUE

Secure Payments

Every transaction is encrypted and held safely until you confirm receipt.

Verified Sellers

Every seller passes an identity and listing accuracy check before going live.

Nationwide Delivery

Tracked courier delivery to any address, or arrange free local collection.

Buyer Protection

Funds are only released once your wheels arrive matching the listing.

Fast Support

Real humans respond to fitment and order queries within a few hours.
